descriptionShort: Humboldt Broncos defeat Richmond Sockeyes 6-1 in Centennial Cup round-robin play.
descriptionLong: Humboldt Broncos dominated Richmond Sockeyes 6-1 in Centennial Cup round-robin play on May 7, 1987. The lopsided victory saw the Broncos outscore and outplay Richmond in all aspects. Coach Rich Kurtenbach acknowledged the loss, stating the team lacked intensity. Richmond finished the round robin 2-1 and will face Pembroke in the semi-final, with the Broncos (3-0) advancing directly to the championship.

attribution.headline: Humboldt dominates Richmond in Centennial Cup round robin
